robot.name: CF3
robot.crash.1: Quick, there's no time to explain. The gyroscope failed and I have no cameras up there to check on it.
robot.crash.2: You have to go up and fix it. I can't pilot the ship until it's working.
robot.crash.2.5: What are you looking at? Hurry up!
robot.crash.3: Use this tool to fix it.
robot.crash.3.5: I understand you already know how to use it.
robot.crash.4: What happened? I just lost contact with the gyroscope.
robot.crash.5: It's like it's completely broken. I can't do anything.
robot.crash.6: We won’t be able to dodge the satellite like this. Hold on to something.
robot.intro.1: Wait for me, I'm coming with you.
robot.intro.2.5: . Don’t worry, I won’t fall behind.
robot.intro.3: I don't have legs, but I can fly. :)
robot.intro.4: After breaking the gyroscope, the ship lost control and we crashed.
robot.intro.5: Since you broke it, you clearly don't know what you're doing.
robot.intro.7: We were heading to the Space Station "Palette" when we crashed into one of its satellites.
robot.intro.8: These satellites are abandoned, but we can teleport to the Palette from the labs in their cores.
robot.intro.9: We need to hurry and warn the Palette before the asteroid hits.
robot.intro.10: So hurry up. Find a path to the lab.
robot.plants.1: This satellite is inhabited only by plants.
robot.plants.2: Some of them will try to eat you, so be very careful.
robot.eaten: I warned you! Be more careful next time.
robot.hard.2: I've been watching you, and it seems you like going where you shouldn't.
robot.hard.3: Don’t worry, I respect that and I’ll give you what you want.
robot.hard.4: It’s always more fun when it's unnecessarily difficult.
robot.sound.3: The asteroid has already hit the Palette.
robot.sound.4: Following emergency protocol, we need to collect the cores in the Palette.
robot.sound.5: So our mission hasn’t changed. Hurry.
robot.lab.0: That’s the lab over there, although the door seems blocked.
robot.lab.0.5: The lab covers the entire satellite, so we need to find another entrance.
robot.lab.1: This door is blocked too, but it's our only option.
robot.lab.2: We’ll need something to move these rocks.
robot.core.1: That wasn’t the intended path. But hey, we made it to the core.
robot.core.2: At the end of this hallway should be the core.
robot.core.4: They’re poorly designed and still there, even if invisible.
robot.core.5: The core is going out of control!
robot.core.6: Get into the tube and secure it.
robot.captcha.1: I don’t want to distract you, but I need a small favor.
robot.captcha.2: I was accessing your data, but there’s a question I can’t solve.
robot.captcha.3: I think the issue is that I can't interpret the image correctly.
robot.captcha.4: Could you fill it in, please?
robot.captcha.5: Perfect! Thank you for your help. ^^
robot.end.2: I need to follow emergency protocol.
robot.end.3: And the teleporter is unstable with multiple entities.
ctarron.results.hours: It took you %s hours, %s minutes, %s seconds, and %s kurons to find the core.
ctarron.results.hour: It took you %s hour, %s minutes, %s seconds, and %s kurons to find the core.
ctarron.results.mins: It took you %s%s minutes, %s seconds, and %s kurons to find the core.
robot.end.4: The average Kuron would have found it in under 10 minutes.
robot.end.4.5: You didn’t take too long, but you’ve already fulfilled your purpose.
robot.end.5: Even if you try again, it won’t be enough.
robot.end.6: Thank you for playing again. I hope you improved your previous time.
robot.end.7: Make sure to share your time and try out Kuron Flux (out now).
dialog.instructions.text1:
A minimum of 10 chunks is recommended for both rendering and simulation distance.
For a more inmersive experience, set "FOV Effects" to OFF and entity distance to 500.

Make sure you don't have any other resource packs installed.
dialog.instructions.text.mods:
This map is made to be played in the original (vanilla) version of Minecraft.

Playing with mods and/or shaders (Sodium) may produce unexpected results.
dialog.instructions.text2:
Music - Kortizas.
Ambience sounds - Petoline.
In music options.
If you have any issues, contact the map creator.
ctarron.retry:
Play again to set a faster time.
(There are no alternate endings.)
